---
title: "About me..."
---

I am currently an MSc Urban Spatial Science student at the Bartlett Centre for Advanced Spatial Analysis, University College London. I hold a BSc Urban Planning and Development degree from Cardiff University. I am interested in city regeneration, transport planning, spatial analysis and evidence-led urban design.

My work combines planning knowledge with digital and analytical tools, including GIS, spatial data science, statistical analysis and urban design software. I am committed to applying digital analytics to navigate complexity and support inclusive, practical and long-term decision-making in the built environment.

View my [CV](cv.qmd) and [Coursework](coursework.qmd) →

## Technical Proficiency

**Languages**: Python, SQL, R

**Tools**: Git and GitHub, ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, SNAP, Google Earth Engine, NetLogo, AutoCAD, SketchUp, Blender, Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign, Microsoft Word, PowerPoint, Excel

[View my GitHub →](https://github.com/Nanxi-lu)

## Languages

-   Mandarin Chinese and Shanghainese: native
-   English: bilingual proficiency
-   French: B2 proficiency
-   Japanese: A2 working knowledge
-   German: A1 basic knowledge

## Interests and Hobbies

-   Tennis, Running, Hiking, Pilates, Painting, Baking, Travelling
